backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Arena app that manages user profiles and content metadata (audio/video uploads) with access control, blob storage mixins, and query/update methods for uploading, retrieving, and searching content.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (upload flow, discovery feed, thumbnail creation, visual theme) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every component, page, hook, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes, used as the shadcn-ui design system foundation.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app titled 'The Arena', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with Feed, Upload, and ContentDetail routes inside a Layout shell, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Clickable content card component displaying thumbnail/cover image, file type badge, title, uploader name, view/like counts, and a hover play overlay with neon glow styling.
Reusable drag-and-drop file input component supporting audio, video, and image categories, with file name/size display, a clear button, and arena dark theme styling.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header (logo, nav links, login button), mobile nav bar, main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: Displays a media player for audio (with album cover and controls) or video files, using direct URLs from ExternalBlob objects.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: Provides a UI for creating or uploading a thumbnail—for audio it accepts an image upload, for video it allows scrubbing and frame capture from a preview.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity auth context provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching/saving user profiles, listing and retrieving content, incrementing views, and uploading content.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Outfit, Bebas Neue), sets up Tailwind, and defines a dark-themed Arena design system with OKLCH CSS custom properties, neon glow utilities, and card hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a single content item by ID, rendering a MediaPlayer with metadata (title, stats, description) and incrementing view count on load.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that lists all content with filter tabs (all/audio/video), fetches uploader display names, and renders a hero banner alongside a sorted grid of ContentCards.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter an artist/creator name and saves it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Upload form page that accepts media files (audio/video), detects file type, optionally attaches a thumbnail or album cover, and submits the content with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a utility function `captureVideoFrame` that draws the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement onto a canvas and returns it as a PNG Blob.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Arena app, defining dark mode, custom fonts (Outfit, Bebas Neue), oklch-based color tokens (including arena-specific neon/dark palette), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for 'The Arena' social media platform, documenting schema version, architectural notes, existing features (upload flow, discovery feed, thumbnail tool, dark theme), and required image assets.
